subcodes.first_line: O my God! I earnestly beseech and supplicate unto the Kingdom of Thy forgiveness and the Dominion of Thy glory and power, that Thou mayest embrace them in Thy pardon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللّهمّ یا الهی انّی اتضرّع و ابتهل الی ملکوت غفرانک و جبروت عزّک و اقتدارک ان تدرک هؤلاء بعفوک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
